purpose: Machine-readable register of blockers formally deferred under resource constraint. Deferred blockers are NOT ignored - they carry explicit claim ceilings, reentry conditions, and scope restrictions that remain binding until the deferral is resolved.
hard_rules: A deferred blocker retains all claim ceilings and scope restrictions as if it were OPEN.
No stream may narrate a deferred blocker as closed, resolved, or irrelevant.
Deferral expires only when the reentry_condition is satisfied and the named validators re-pass.
Validators, omega_gate, and truth_engine must treat DEFERRED_RESOURCE_CONSTRAINT as OPEN for claim and release gating.

deferred.reason: No second-host hardware currently available for friendly cross-host replay. Single-operator lab with one machine.

may_continue: W0/W1 internal runtime realization and organ disposition
W2 lawful evolution, adapters, tournaments (LAB_GOVERNED only)
Capability atlas compilation (bounded to E1 evidence)
Claim compiler operation (bounded to E1 ceiling)
Business model, investor materials (with E1 claim ceiling)
Proof bundles and evidence packs (same-host only)
Omega gate internals and governance hardening
MVCR live execution on canonical paths
must_not: Claim E2, E3, or E4 externality
Claim commercial externality or enterprise readiness
Narrate same-host replay as outsider trust
Publish press-ready or product-launch materials above E1 ceiling

reentry_condition.description: Fresh second-host return file imported and all C006 validators re-pass at current HEAD.
required_steps: Obtain access to a second host (cloud VM, second laptop, university lab, VPS, friend's machine)
Copy detached verifier package to second host using kt_independent_replay_recipe.md
Run detached verifier entrypoint on second host with no hidden secrets
Capture result, runtime receipt, and host environment metadata
If all pass: raise externality ceiling from E1 to E2 and remove this deferral
